schedule_description: Salon/spa pages list available services. Select a service type → optionally pick a stylist → choose date from calendar → select time slot → fill client info → confirm.
flow_steps: Navigate to the salon/spa page on vagaro.com
Browse the service menu and select the desired service
Navigate the calendar to the target date
Fill in client name, email, phone
obstacles: Cookie consent popup may appear — dismiss it
Some salons require a Vagaro account to book — report LOGIN_REQUIRED
Service menu may have many categories — look for the most relevant one
Calendar may default to the current week — navigate forward to the target date
Some services have different durations and prices — pick the standard option
If the salon requires a deposit, report PAYMENT_REQUIRED
The 'Book' button may be disabled until all required fields are filled
